config.title: PLF_TITLE #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'Bulid_Choicelist_Transakcja_Row #include "50634"
'qx_/qv_* #include "50200"
#ifndef std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects #define std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects_renamed #endif 'operations buttons #include "50128"
#undef std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects
'section_ #include "50222"
'enum2str #include "50100"
function fsearch() dim pSearchChoice : set pSearchChoice = doc_.getmodule(60115) pSearchChoice.addAdditionalWhere "N5PLATNOSC.pRejestrDok=" + CStr(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj) fsearch = pSearchChoice.std_search(page_) set pSearchChoice = nothing end function
function fopen() : fopen = true create_schemat_radio if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE
rebuild_configuration end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
function foptions FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
if doc_.getmodule(60175).dok_rej_preferences(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC) then
FORCE_REALOAD_OBJECT(page_.root.pRejestrDok)
'apply settings rebuild_configuration end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects = fsave() end function
function fsave() : fsave = false if page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing then trans_.message 0,0,"Brak podmiotu operacji" exit function end if if page_.root.curKwotaPodm = ccur(0.0) then trans_.message 0,0,"Brak kwoty operacji" exit function end if
dim pPozycja if page_.root.listPozycje.exists(1) then set pPozycja = page_.root.listPozycje.get(1) else set pPozycja = page_.root.listPozycje.addnew() end if
if pPozycja.pTransakcja is nothing then dim pNewTrans : set pNewTrans = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA) with pNewTrans set .wrefPodmiot = page_.root.wrefPodmiot if page_.root.curKwotaPodm > 0 then .eTyp = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC) .curWn = page_.root.curKwotaPodm else .eTyp = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE) .curMa = - page_.root.curKwotaPodm end if .strSymTrans = "TRANS" + cstr(pNewTrans.idobj) end with set pPozycja.pTransakcja = pNewTrans else if pPozycja.pTransakcja.wrefPodmiot is nothing then set pPozycja.pTransakcja.wrefPodmiot = page_.root.wrefPodmiot end if end if pPozycja.curPozKwotaPodm = page_.root.curKwotaPodm
fsave = std_fsave() end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Blokuje lub nie kursy walut '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function LockUnLock_RateOfExchange() end function
function c##CTRLID_KWOTA_PODM##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_KWOTA_PODM##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = (PLF_FACTOR) * page_.root.curKwotaPodm
if (not page_.root.pWalutaPodm is nothing) then pCtrl.unit = page_.root.pWalutaPodm.strSkrot else pCtrl.unit = "" end if
LockUnLock_RateOfExchange end function
function c##CTRLID_TRIGGER##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl):c##CTRLID_TRIGGER##_ongetdata=true #ifndef PLF_HIDE_TRANSAKCJE page_.ctrl(CTRLID_BTN_ASSIGN).disable = (page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS).disable = (page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_BTN_ADDTRANS).disable = (page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing) or (page_.ctrl(CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS).value = "") #endif end function
function c##CTRLID_KLIENT_INX##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl):c##CTRLID_KLIENT_INX##_ongetdata=true
if not page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing then if page_.root.wrefPodmiot.type <> TYPEID_N5KLIENT then pCtrl.value = "" exit function end if end if
std_rs_getdata_obj pCtrl, _ page_.root.wrefPodmiot, _ doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(TYPEID_N5KLIENT).getfieldindex("strIndeks"), true end function
function c##CTRLID_KLIENT_INX##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) c##CTRLID_KLIENT_INX##_ondataentered = std_rs_dataentered_s(pCtrl,varValue,"wrefPodmiot","strIndeks",CRSR_N5KLIENT_WG_INX,nothing) end function
dim g_SymbolTransakcji : g_SymbolTransakcji = "" function c##CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl):c##CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS##_ongetdata=true pCtrl.value = g_SymbolTransakcji end function
function c##CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) c##CTRLID_EDIT_SYMBTRANS##_ondataentered = true g_SymbolTransakcji = varValue end function
function c##CTRLID_KWOTA_PODM##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl, varValue) : c##CTRLID_KWOTA_PODM##_ondataentered=true LockUnLock_RateOfExchange page_.root.curKwotaPodm = (PLF_FACTOR) * varValue end function
QVX_REJESTR_DOK(CTRLID_REJDOK) QVX_UZYTKOWNIK_REJESTRUJACY(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ) QVE_NRDOK_FROM_REJESTR(CTRLID_NUMDOK,pRejestrDok,strNrDok) QVX_DOWOD_KSIEGOWY(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG) QVX_SCHEMAT_DEKR(CTRLID_SCHEMAT)
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_KWOTA_EWID,page_.root.curKwotaEwid,getCurrentFirma.pWaluta,PLF_FACTOR) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_KWOTA_STAN,page_.root.curKwotaStan,page_.root.pRejestrDok.wrefParam1,PLF_FACTOR)
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_LBL_PODMIOT,wrefPodmiot) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_ZADANIE,pZadanie) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_REJKAS,plat_pRapKas)
SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_POZ_KWOTAPODM ,page_.root.listPozycje,curPozKwotaPodm,page_.root.pWalutaPodm,PLF_FACTOR,2) SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_POZ_KWOTAEWID ,page_.root.listPozycje,curPozKwotaEwid,getCurrentFirma.pWaluta,PLF_FACTOR,2)
private sub rebuild_configuration dim pConfigObject : set pConfigObject = nothing dim pConfigModule : set pConfigModule = nothing rebuild_operation_buttons page_.root.pRejestrDok,CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW, pConfigObject, pConfigModule end sub
function cust_operation_hli(byref pHLI) std_cust_operation_hli pHLI,page_.root.pRejestrDok,page_.root,page_ end function
function c##CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,nRow,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) dim strWhereTransType if page_.root.curKwotaPodm < 0 then strWhereTransType = "(eTyp= N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE)" elseif page_.root.curKwotaPodm > 0 then strWhereTransType = "(eTyp= N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC)" else strWhereTransType = "(1=1)" end if
if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " + strWhereTransType else strWhere = strWhereTransType end if
if not page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing then if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + doc_.afc.convert.Formatter("(wrefPodmiot_wrt=%1) and (wrefPodmiot=%2) ") _ .add(cstr(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.type)).add(cstr(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj)).done() end if
end function
function assign_transactions dim pModule : set pModule = doc_.getmodule(60270) pModule.pl_auto_assign_transaction page_.root,"" end function
function add_trans() dim strWhere : strWhere = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("strSymTrans='%1' and wrefPodmiot=%2 and wrefPodmiot_wrt=%3") _ (trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(g_SymbolTransakcji)) _ (page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj)(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.type).Done()
dim idTrans: idTrans = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,strWhere) if idTrans = 0 then dim pPozycja : set pPozycja = page_.root.listPozycje.addnew() pPozycja.curPozKwotaTrans = page_.root.curKwotaPodm - page_.root.curSumaPozPodm dim pNewTrans : set pNewTrans = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA) with pNewTrans set .wrefPodmiot = page_.root.wrefPodmiot if page_.root.curKwotaPodm > 0 then .eTyp = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC) .curWn = page_.root.curKwotaPodm else .eTyp = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE) .curMa = - page_.root.curKwotaPodm end if .strSymTrans = g_SymbolTransakcji end with set pPozycja.pTransakcja = pNewTrans else trans_.message 0,0,"Istnieje juz transakcja o takim symbolu" end if end function
function c##CTRLID_SCHEMAT_RADIO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_SCHEMAT_RADIO##_ongetdata=true dim id:id = 1
if not page_.root.pSchematDekr is nothing then id = page_.root.pSchematDekr.idobj
id = page_.root.pSchematDekr.idobj dim elem,iter:iter = 1 for each elem in oCtrl if clng(elem.userprop.prop(1)) = id then exit for end if iter = iter + 1 next oCtrl.value = clng(iter) else oCtrl.value = clng(0) end if end function
function c##CTRLID_SCHEMAT_RADIO##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl , byval value) c##CTRLID_SCHEMAT_RADIO##_ondataentered=true dim elem,iter iter = 1 for each elem in oCtrl if iter = value then set page_.root.pSchematDekr = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR, clng(elem.userprop.prop(1))) page_.root.strOpis = mid(page_.root.pSchematDekr.strNazwa,3) exit for end if iter = iter + 1 next end function
function c##CTRLID_POZ_KWOTATRANS##_ongetdata(pCtrl,row): c##CTRLID_POZ_KWOTATRANS##_ongetdata = true if page_.root.listPozycje.exists(row) then dim pElement:set pElement = page_.root.listPozycje.get(row) if not pElement is nothing then pCtrl.value = ccur(pElement.curPozKwotaTrans) if not pElement.pTransakcja is nothing then pCtrl.unit = pElement.pTransakcja.pWaluta.strSkrot pCtrl.precision = pElement.pTransakcja.pWaluta.nDokladnosc - 1 else pCtrl.unit = "" pCtrl.precision = clng(2)'#*gvar_price_prec end if exit function end if end if pCtrl.unit = "" pCtrl.precision = clng(2)'#*gvar_price_prec pCtrl.value = CCur(0.0) end function
SVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE_DATAENTER(CTRLID_POZ_KWOTATRANS,page_.root.listPozycje,curPozKwotaTrans,1)
dim g_nOldNumOper:g_nOldNumOper=-1 dim g_curOldStan:g_curOldStan = ccur(0)
function c##CTRLID_STATUS##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_STATUS##_ongetdata=true dim curStanKasy if (page_.root.nNumOper <> g_nOldNumOper) then g_curOldStan = page_.root.n5platnosc_stan(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idObj,page_.root.nNumOper) g_nOldNumOper = page_.root.nNumOper #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 7000 , 0 , "wyliczam stan kasy" #endif end if curStanKasy = g_curOldStan + page_.root.curKwotaStan
dim strText strText = PLF_STAN_TEXT + "(" + page_.root.pRejestrDok.strNazwa + ") po operacji: " +_ doc_.afc.display.money(curStanKasy,page_.root.pRejestrDok.wrefParam1.strSkrot) #if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY if page_.root.curKwotaStan < 0.0 then strText = strText + " status: " + enum2str(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,ENUMFLDNR_N5PLATNOSC_STATUS,page_.root.eStatus) end if #endif oCtrl.text = strText #if appvar_rejestr_typ = N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CONFIRM_ROW).hide = (page_.root.eStatus = N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA) #endif end function
function c##CTRLID_SUMAPOZPODM##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl) : c##CTRLID_SUMAPOZPODM##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.text = doc_.afc.display.money(page_.root.curSumaPozPodm, page_.root.pWalutaPodm.strSkrot) end function
function confirm_realized page_.root.eStatus = clng(N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA) std_fsave() end function
function std_choice_lst_cq_hli_with_vars(byref pHLI) std_choice_lst_cq_hli_with_vars = 0 if page_.root.curKwotaPodm > ccur(0.0) then trans_.var(APPVAR_TRANSAKCJA_KWOTA_WN) = page_.root.curKwotaPodm else trans_.var(APPVAR_TRANSAKCJA_KWOTA_MA) = -page_.root.curKwotaPodm end if
if not page_.root.wrefPodmiot is nothing then select case page_.root.wrefPodmiot.type case TYPEID_N5KLIENT trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_CUSTOMER) = clng(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj) case TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_EMPLOYEE) = clng(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj) case TYPEID_N5BANK trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_BANK) = clng(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj) case TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_INSTYTUCJA) = clng(page_.root.wrefPodmiot.idobj) end select
std_choice_lst_cq_hli pHLI trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_CUSTOMER) = clng(0) trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_EMPLOYEE) = clng(0) trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_BANK) = clng(0) trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_INSTYTUCJA) = clng(0) end if trans_.var(APPVAR_TRANSAKCJA_KWOTA_WN) = ccur(0.0) trans_.var(APPVAR_TRANSAKCJA_KWOTA_MA) = ccur(0.0) end function
function create_schemat_radio() dim radio:set radio = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SCHEMAT_RADIO) dim item dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR,_ "pRejestrDok=" + cstr(page_.root.pRejestrDok.idobj), "strNazwa" , "") dim elem dim hli for each elem in cursor set item = radio.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) item.text = elem.strNazwa
set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(1) = elem.idobj
set item.userprop = hli next end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_NAGLOWEK,Nagłówek,FORM_SPAN)
#if appvar_rejestr_typ <> N5REJESTRDOK_KOMPENSATY QXR_INFO_CUSTOM(Info: ,CTRLID_STATUS,FORM_SPAN) QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN) #endif
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Numer dokumentu,1) QXC_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_NUMDOK,20,1) QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data operacji,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dDataOper,1)
#ifndef PLF_HIDE_KWOTY
QXC_LABEL(Kwota od/dla podmiotu,1)
QXE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KWOTA_PODM,15,2,)
#endif QXR_EDIT_WILDREF_OPEN_REQ(PLF_PODMIOT_NAME,CTRLID_LBL_PODMIOT,-1,60,PICTURE_WYBOR,wrefPodmiot,strNazwa;strNazwisko;strNazwa,;eAktywny=1;,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifdef PLF_SHOW_KLIENT_INX
QXC_LABEL(Indeks klienta,1)
QXE_PICTURE_CHOICE(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT,wrefPodmiot,strIndeks,CRSR_N5KLIENT_WG_INX)
#endif
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_POZYCJE,Pozycje,FORM_SPAN) #ifndef PLF_HIDE_TRANSAKCJE
QXE_BUTTON(CTRLID_BTN_ASSIGN,0,Przypisz transakcje,varFunction="assign_transactions") lub dodaj nową
Dodaj
listPozycje
Transakcja Kwota dla/od podmiotu
SXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TRANSAKCJA,varFunctionHLI="std_choice_lst_cq_hli_with_vars" vs1="pTransakcja" vs2="strSymTrans" vn3="CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA" vs4="listPozycje" vs5="Bulid_Choicelist_Transakcja_Row" ,Wybór z listy) SXE_EDIT_REF_CQ(CTRLID_STUB_TRANSAKCJA,20,pTransakcja,strSymTrans)
SXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_POZ_KWOTAPODM,15,2,)
QXC_RTEXT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_SUMAPOZPODM, 0, 1)
#endif
QXC_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,Wprowadził: ,1) QXC_TEXT_REF(-1,20,pUzytRej,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_OPIS,CTRLID_OPIS,strOpis,Opis,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_OPERATIONS(CTRLID_OPERATIONS_ROW,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_BUTTON(-1,0,Potwierdzam realizację,varFunction="confirm_realized",FORM_SPAN)
QXF_END
